theme_clusters.name: AI + Product Craft
theme_clusters.description: How AI agents change building, team structure, and product development. Includes: AI coding workflows, agent architecture, AI-assisted product management, human-AI collaboration patterns, AI transformation in organizations.

theme_clusters.name: Media Industry Dynamics
theme_clusters.description: The business, distribution, and survival questions facing news and media companies. Includes: media business models, streaming economics, audience development for publishers, platform shifts, creator economy intersections with traditional media.

theme_clusters.name: Journalism + AI Tooling
theme_clusters.description: The specific intersection of newsroom workflows and AI capabilities. Includes: AI for fact-checking, newsroom automation, AI and editorial ethics, open-source journalism tools, local news innovation.

theme_clusters.name: Career Identity & Resilience
theme_clusters.description: Job transitions, what work means, leadership under uncertainty. Includes: layoff recovery, identity beyond title, navigating career change, leadership philosophy, resilience frameworks.

theme_clusters.name: Creator/Audience Building Mechanics
theme_clusters.description: How individuals build audiences, platform mechanics, content strategy. Includes: Substack growth tactics, newsletter strategy, video/podcast production, audience engagement patterns.

noise_filters.name: Personal milestone celebrations
noise_filters.exception: Contains substantive industry commentary beyond the announcement
